review_text:
Brilliant holiday place. Perfect location!
Loved it.
Really enjoyed the stay on way through to my mates farm, such a nice spot, great fishing close by,  good surf up the road, some areas need some spit and polish but loved it, thanks- nice people, fab!

Kempsey council seriously needs to overhaul this park. Besides the general landscape such as beaches, creeks, parks , fishing etc, the holiday park as they call it, has nothing to offer.

The amenities are outdated and in need of refurbishment.  The sites require a hard look. Some have artificial turf, they are the ones to target. Otherwise you get a mix of dirt, rocks and weeds. If it rains you get mud through your camp-site.

The folks running the park have little to no clue about customer service and how patrons like to book the same sites each year. Not to mention so other strange ideas but enough said. For the knowledge level, they are doing the best they can.

The internet connection is unsecured and mostly doesn't work.  If you need to work while away you need to bring your own connection or stay at a different place.

A lot of room for improvement here.
Nice park. Good for kids.

Awesome place to visit so relaxing friendly staff and lots to do. Close to restaurants and pubs,clubs and  beach with great views. Will definitely return again. Thank you for the great Holiday guys. 🤩👍
Fabulous location good amenities tidy well laid out sites
Excellent.  Been coming for 40 years now my children come each year.
The caravan park is excellent, view to the beach. It has lots of facilities, amenities are very clean. Staff is very helpful and friendly. It is also dog friendly.
Beautiful beach, shops and pub directly across the road. Full shopping experience about 2kms away..kmart, coles, big stores.
On caravan site is roomy and great water views been coming here for many years

Clean tidy amenities and good tidy park, lively staff.
Dogs allowed.
Stayed in a tiny home. This was perfect and felt so luxurious.  Right on the beach, easy check in and out. Easy walk to shops and everything you need. Definitely coming back!
All good

Great location, good van sites, and close to town. The only downside was the amenities in the Southern Block, which were always Sandy and dirty. The ladies only had 2 showers with shelves to put clothes etc but these were alwsys in use. Some urgent maintenance needed.

The beach and location at Horseshoe Bay are absolutely lovely – it’s a stunning spot and had the potential to be a great stay. Unfortunately, the camping experience was soured by the receptionist’s attitude and lack of flexibility.

Despite indicating we would be placed alongside other RVs with a view over the larger caravans and towards the beach, we were instead boxed in among large caravans and their tow vehicles. There were vacant spots available with better positioning, yet we were not offered one.

I politely asked if we could at least drive our Toyota HiAce front-in, so that our side door and small pull-out awning could face away from the sun and allow us a bit of shade and a glimpse of the water. It’s a single vehicle, so we would have easily fit either way. The answer was a firm no, with the rule that all vehicles must reverse into their site, without any consideration of circumstances.

I expect a little flexibility in a park like this, especially when it costs good money to stay. I’m left wondering what difference it would have made, and why we weren’t placed with the other RVs as initially suggested.

Beautiful setting – but spoiled by unnecessary rigidity and an unhelpful reception experience
Fabulous place to camp, near everything and most beautiful views. Lots of whales and pods of dolphins. Cabins need cleaning and refurbishing but fine for short stays.
Great place for family gathering.  Front desk  operator appeared somewhat unwell, unpleasant,agitated.  However she got the job done.,
Absolutely fantastic location, great services and township is great to.

Top Spot! This would have to be the best location for a caravan park I've been to.  Beach front, beautiful big sites (some are a little tight to manoeuvre into) but once in you forget all about that. It's an extremely well looked after and beautiful park. The bathroom facilities are old but I believe there's plans to update these.

The customer service is great 👍

There's great walks and a leash free beach for your dogs at your doorstep. Shops, cafes and a pub opposite the park.

I'd come back in a heartbeat.

Great caravan sites opposite the beach
Easy access to walks a d township
Beautiful spot on the water
Great views

This Ppark offers a fantastic getaway with its prime location and stunning views, whether you're facing the beach or the road. The park is conveniently situated right across from a local pub, making it easy to grab a bite or a drink. The grounds are well-maintained, clean, and tidy, creating a pleasant atmosphere for guests.
While the bathrooms could use a modern upgrade, they are still kept clean and functional. The park provides a safe and secure environment, making it an excellent choice for families with children. Just a heads-up for those who enjoy their sleep: the natural sounds of birds nesting at dawn and dusk might disturb your rest, so morning sleep-ins might be out of the question. However, it's a delightful reminder that you're surrounded by nature.
The staff at Horseshoe Bay are incredibly friendly and very helpful, adding to the welcoming vibe of the park. Overall, it's an ideal spot for a family vacation, balancing convenience, natural beauty, and a relaxed atmosphere.

Well…location, location, location…it is indeed astounding. We have a waterfront site and it’s beautiful. Right in the heart of town. The lady at reception was lovely and welcoming, our site (58) very level with gravel for van, concrete slab for awning and car parked on the synthetic grass. We are directly opposite the amenities block which is a bonus as we came here to specifically get a big load of washing done after a free camp and conserving water. I was both disappointed and annoyed that the laundry only had 2 washing machines and 1 dryer which is out of order. Ridiculous to only have one dryer as it’s a big park and my disability prevents me from carting my dirty washing down to the other amenities block. The site we are on is also a little tight getting our 22ft van on it but my partner got it done fairly quickly and did a good job; it may be a bit daunting for someone less skilled at reverse parking a big van though. Looking forward to sightseeing in this lovely town tomorrow. I would definitely come back to this park. My less than perfect score is simply a reflection at the inadequate laundry situation.
Great caravan park,  some of the best views you could ask for,  very clean amenities
Great spots overlooking the beach.

Some sites don't have a lot of room to manoeuvre due to opposing rock wall, but great views, and coffee van on site. Note huge flock of laurikeets will wake you from the trees pre dawn at the Eastern end of Park.

Great beach and spectacular views. The cabin was pretty basic but ok if your out and about most of the time. Had everything in there we needed.
Very central to everything

Beautiful location but amenities located at the top are disgraceful
The showers in both the men & women block have broken ceramic soap holders with sharp edges still on the wall. These are a huge risk for injury
Some of the taps in the men’s shower won’t turn on
To charge $60 per night is ludicrous
We got the best site! Magical

Haven't had the chance to stay there as yet. But I had a look at the sites available.
The staff in the office were welcoming and obliging. We hope to come back and stay a while in this beautiful part of NSW.
Close to everything and a short walk to anything else. Can't wait.

Wow we had an awesome spot overlooking the beach.
The camp grounds give you fantastic access to the local shops, the beach and some lovely walks around the coastline.
The camp ground is dog 🐶 friendly. There is also an off leash dog beach a short walk south past the spirit boat and surf club.
The amenities are good and kept clean with soap and sanitiser.
1 tip would be to place the bottle return bins around the grounds rather than near the entrance. Many people just throw their returns away and I almost did until I noticed the return bags.
We would definitely recommend staying here and would be happy to return again in the future.
What a great park in a wonder location and extremely  helpful staff
Small tight caravan sites but what a great location and views
Love spot picture perfect

My wife and I love it here! We love the location, the cleanliness and the friendly, helpful staff. The caravan park is well maintained.  The spot is perfect with the most amazing views and walks, shops, cafes and restaurants all right at our front door
We are camping in our caravan here and we are so impressed.  We love the location,  the easy access to the town, wonderful walks, great cafes.  The view is spectacular!
Best caravan park in Australia 🇦🇺
Cabins needed a little TLC. But were very well equipped.
We've a beautiful spot right in front of the Horseshoe Bay. The powered site we booked has a pretty new concrete slab with synthetic grass around us. Excellent site.
A wonderful park in an excellent location. The park is well run and extremely tidy and clean.  Such a privilege to camp in such a beautiful location.
Stayed in a Cabin, comfortable. Park adjacent Ocean, Beach, Shops & Eateries. So location first class..

This has got to be one of the best Caravan Parks in Australia. Amazing views over a beautiful beach with rolling surf. Good fishing on the beach or the creek only 100 m walk. Sleepy township but offers everything you need. We just keep going back.
Top location best site at park

Stayed here in a standard cabin for 3 nights and thank god it was only 3 nights! These cabins should be demolished and definitely not allowed to be booked out! |Firstly, after confirming  a week before arriving,our cabin was supposed be close to our other family members, only to arrive and find out they had given our cabin to someone else, and then to top it off we were given the worst accommodation I have ever stayed in. |They are very run down with a lot of dampness in every part of the cabin, with the walls peeling off literally. They smell of sewage, the blinds are falling off the doors and don’t close, under the bed has some sort of slimy substance there, they don’t leave any soaps, hair shampoos or conditioners, and they really need to replace their bathroom towels! |I would definitely recommend people staying at the other holiday parks over this one
Fantastic location beautiful beaches.
Walked through  to get to walk, looks very vlezn a nd tidy
Loved this place
5 time we have been here . All facilities were clean and tidy very friendly staff looking forward to going back next year .
Beach front sites wonderful
Staff helpful, amenities immaculate,  and best views ever.
